memoryArtifacts.headline: Cutter, Marmaduke  story 1557-1576
memoryArtifacts.description: Marmaduke Cutter was born in 1557 in Northumberland, England. He married Margaret Cutter in 1575 in his hometown. They had one child during their marriage. He died as a young father in 1576 in England …

zh.Newcastle-Upon-Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Marmaduke Cutter於1556年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，他的父親Thomas Esquire Cutter31歲，母親Mrs Thomas Esquire Cutter36歲。他於1574年與Margaret Credie在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1576年在他的家鄉享年20歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋哥吉拉 沙也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Marmaduke Cutter于1556年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，他的父亲Thomas Esquire Cutter31岁，母亲Mrs Thomas Esquire Cutter36岁。他于1574年与Margaret Credie在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1576年在他的家乡享年20岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋哥吉拉 沙也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Cutter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English cuttere ‘craftsman who cuts things; tailor, barber’ possibly also ‘stonecutter, woodcutter’, from an agent derivative of Old English cyttan ‘to cut’.

variants.name: Kotter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Dietmar, Kurt.
habitational name for someone from any of several places in Germany named Kotten.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Marmaduke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain derivation. It is generally held to be an Anglicized form of the Old Irish name Mael-Maedóc ‘devotee of Maedóc’. The name Maedóc was borne by various early Irish saints, most notably a 6th-century abbot of Clonmore and a 7th-century bishop of Ferns. Mael-Maedóc Ó Morgair ( 1095–1148 ) was a reformer of the Church in Ireland and a friend of Bernard of Clairvaux. However, the modern Gaelic form (from c.1200 ) is Maol-Maodhóg (pronounced ‘mul-may-og’), so that the name would have had to have been borrowed into English before this loss of the d. Marmaduke has never been common except in Yorkshire, where for example it was bourne by Marmaduke Huby , abbot of Fountains, ( 1495–1526 ). Its most notable bearer in recent times has been Marmaduke Hussey ( 1923–2006 ), a former chairman of the governors of the BBC.

en.lifeSummary: When William Marmaduke Cutter was born in 1556, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Esquire Cutter, was 31 and his mother, Mrs Thomas Esquire Cutter, was 36. He married Margaret Credie in 1574, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1576, in his hometown, at the age of 20, and was buried in All Saint's Church, Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Marmaduke Cutter est né en 1556, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Esquire Cutter, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas Esquire Cutter, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Credie en 1574, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1576, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 20 ans, et a été enterré à All Saint's Church, Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Marmaduke Cutter 1556 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Esquire Cutter 31 und seine Mutter Mrs Thomas Esquire Cutter 36. Er hat 1574 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Margaret Credie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1576 im Alter von 20 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in All Saint's Church, Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear distr: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니

ko.lifeSummary: William Marmaduke Cutter(이)가 1556년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Esquire Cutter(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Esquire Cutter(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1574년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Margaret Credie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1576년 그의 고향에서 20세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니 앨 세인트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Marmaduke Cutter nasceu em 1556, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Esquire Cutter, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Thomas Esquire Cutter, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Credie em 1574, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1576, em sua cidade natal, com 20 anos, e foi sepultado em All Saint's Church, Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Marmaduke Cutter родился в 1556 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Esquire Cutter было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Esquire Cutter, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Credie в 1574 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1576 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 20 лет и был похоронен в местности алл сеинт'с чурч, нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.
